name: Multi-Grain Soybean Bread (1 1/2 Lb. Bread Ma
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Soybeans, soaked overnight and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to the bread machine according to the manufacturer's directions.
2. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature unless otherwise specified in the recipe.
3. Follow the specific instructions provided in the owner's manual for adding ingredients to the machine.
4. Always use powdered milk when using the timer function on your machine.
